raya.title: Raya: The Chaos Within
raya.teaser: Embrace the chaos. A new journey awaits.
raya.description: Raya: The Chaos Within is an action-adventure game set in a world fractured by ancient magic. Play as Raya, a warrior seeking to restore balance to a broken moon.
raya.feature_1: Immersive storytelling in a dark fantasy world.
raya.feature_2: Dynamic combat system influenced by lunar phases.

about.title: About Us
about.description: We are a creative studio dedicated to crafting immersive worlds and unforgettable stories. Our passion lies in exploring the unknown and bringing the darkest dreams to light.
about.philosophy_text: At Moonfall Studio, we believe that the most compelling stories are found in the shadows. We explore themes of mystery, resilience, and the beauty found in darkness.
about.history_text: Founded in 2024, we are a small team of passionate developers and artists coming together to build something unique.
